title: Norwegian Chickpea Stew
description: A hearty and comforting stew with the flavors of Norway, made with chickpeas and a touch of creamy richness.

ingredients.name: glazed norwegian sausage
ingredients.notes: Can be substituted with regular sausage

instructions: Heat a large pot over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced norwegian sausage and cook until browned, breaking into smaller pieces as it cooks.
Add the diced onion, carrot, and potato, and cook until the vegetables are slightly tender.
Add the chickpeas, stew, and browned sausage. Stir to combine.
Bring the stew to a simmer, then reduce the heat to low and let cook for 20-25 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
Stir in the creamy just before serving.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
